constraints.description: Player rendered with Phaser Graphics, 3-face box (front/left/right)
constraints.impl_detail: Player extends Phaser.GameObjects.Graphics; _drawCyberSoldier() calls _drawBox() for front+side+top faces

constraints.description: Player left/right movement via A/D or arrow keys
constraints.impl_detail: _setupInput() binds cursor keys + WASD; _handleMovement() applies MOVE_SPEED=220px/s with LANE_MIN_X/LANE_MAX_X bounds

constraints.description: Player fires on Space; bullets use Phaser Sprite
constraints.impl_detail: _handleFiring() emits 'player-fire' event with fire cooldown; Bullet extends Phaser.GameObjects.Sprite with Arcade Physics body

constraints.description: Enemy rendered with Phaser Graphics, 3-face box
constraints.impl_detail: Enemy extends Phaser.GameObjects.Graphics; _draw() calls _drawBox() for front+side+top per enemy type (grunt/heavy/elite)

constraints.description: Enemy perspective projection based on z coordinate; scale = 1/(1+z/1000)
constraints.impl_detail: perspectiveScale(z)=1/(1+z/1000) in PerspectiveProjection.js; Enemy.getScreenPosition() calls projectToScreen(); Enemy.update() applies scale on every frame

constraints.description: Enemy collision detection uses Arcade Physics
constraints.impl_detail: All three classes call scene.physics.add.existing(this) in constructor to enable Arcade Physics body; body.reset() called each frame to track Graphics position
